授業方法:
Classes
will be conducted in a face-to-face, in-classroom format. Each session will
consist of lectures and discussions based on assigned readings, including
relevant articles and texts. Depending on class size, students will give
individual or group presentations on a museum. A museum visit is also planned as part of
the course.

第2回:
【Core Weeks①】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
What is culture? Introduction lecture and discussion.
第3回:
【Core Weeks②】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Language and culture, problems of translation
第4回:
【Core Weeks③】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Representation of cultures, culture and power
第5回:
【Core Weeks④】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Concepts of East and West, Orientalism
第6回:
【Core Weeks⑤】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
The gaze from the Other, the gaze towards the Other, Self representation
第7回:
【Core Week⑥】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Art and culture, Japonisme
第11回:
【Core Weeks⑨】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Individual/ group presentations. This will depend on number of students.
第12回:
【Core Weeks⑩】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Individual/ group presentations. This will depend on number of students.
第13回:
【Core Weeks⑪】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Individual/ group presentations. This will depend on number of students.
第14回:
【Core Weeks⑫】《90minutes》Face-to-face class
Final discussion and conclusion
トピック.授業外学習2: Readings will be assigned, and there will be a number of written submissions done outside of class hours during the course. These are generally for lecture background and in-class discussion purposes. Also, students will be required to research, prepare and give group or individual presentations depending on the class size. Although limited class time will be devoted to preparations, each group is responsible to find extra time out of class to prepare as well.

教科書/Required texts0: No textbook will be required for purchase. Most material will be in the form of printed handouts, or downloads.
参考文献・資料/Reference books0: List of related readings based on what is available in the library will be provided.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Students will be asked to give constructive evaluation of the course and instruction using the university’s standard evaluation format.
Feedback will be provided through oral comments during class or written comments on assignments.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: 授業外学修課題／Assignment, homework required outside class (06)
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
成績評価Grading4: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（比較文化論Ａ）／JSC Comparative Cultural Studies A
担当者: モハッラミプール（MOHARRAMIPOUR ZAHRA）
